product_overview: Surat Siega is a comprehensive web-based letter management system designed for educational institutions to streamline the creation, approval, digital signing, and archiving of official letters.
core_goals: Digitize official letter creation and management processes.
Implement a tiered approval workflow with real-time notifications.
Provide digital signing capabilities including configurable signatures and digital stamps.
Enable searchable digital archives with export and reporting features.
Support role-based access control and secure user authentication.
Facilitate management of letter templates, classifications, and master data for efficient letter creation.
key_features: Surat Tugas Management: Create, edit, approve, preview, and archive assignment letters with multi-recipient support and automatic numbering including suffixes for derivative letters.
Surat Keputusan Management: Manage complex decision letters including legal considerations, attachments, and full workflow from drafting through publishing and archiving.
User and Role Management: CRUD operations for users and roles with role-based permissions, profile management, and soft deletes for data retention.
Master Data Management: Handle classifications, types of tasks, sub-tasks, and letterhead configurations to standardize letter creation.
Template and Library Support: Create and use letter templates and maintain libraries for legal and consideration texts relevant to decision letters.
Digital Signature Management: Manage user digital signatures and configurable stamps for approvals.
Notification System: User notification preferences, in-app notifications, and queued email alerts for workflow events.
Audit Logs: Record detailed user actions for transparency and accountability.
Reporting and Exporting: Dashboard statistics, trend graphs, and export options for Excel, CSV, PDF, and audit logs.
Security Features: Session-based authentication, role-based access control, CSRF protection, data validation, and input sanitization.
user_flow_summary: User logs in via secure authentication and accesses dashboard with quick stats and notifications.
User creates a Surat Tugas or Surat Keputusan using templates or from scratch, inputs data, and optionally selects recipients and attachments.
User submits letter for approval; approvers receive notifications and access approval forms.
Approvers review, approve, or reject letters; system records actions and updates letter status accordingly.
Once approved, letters can be digitally signed with configured signatures and stamps and then archived.
Users can preview letters as PDFs, download finalized letters, or export related reports.
Admin manages users, roles, master data, templates, and system settings.
Audit logs track all key user actions and changes for review.
validation_criteria: All user inputs must be validated and sanitized to prevent security vulnerabilities.
Role-based access control must enforce permissions correctly on all operations.
Workflow transitions must follow defined state diagrams and disallow invalid state changes.
PDF rendering for letters and reports must produce accurate and readable documents.
Notification system must deliver timely alerts according to user preferences and record notification states.
Audit logs must capture complete details of all user actions on data.
System must support responsive UI layouts consistent with provided Blade templates and frontend components.
All CRUD operations for letters, templates, and master data must function correctly and maintain data integrity.
File uploads for attachments and signatures must be securely handled and stored.
Export and reporting features must generate correct and comprehensive outputs as per specifications.
